text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way to the trainers' lounge, I notice
Marvelous Sunday talking to a prospective
student.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You came for the academy's open house,
right?! ☆ What did ya think?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing—everyone's so fast. But I don't think I
could keep up with the training...

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm not even good enough to win a single race.
I've always wanted to, but...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You can't give up on your marvelous dreams
before the starting line! ☆ Chasing them is the
whole reason you're here, isn't it? ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I know! I'm gonna show you all the marvelous
things Tracen Academy has to offer—the stuff
they didn't show you for the open house! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hop on my back! Marvelous Sunday's Marvelous
Academy Tour is a go!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Eeeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday races off with the prospective
student clinging on for dear life!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Wasn't that one of the open house
participants? Why is Marvelous running off with
her?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Stop right this instant!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Marvey?! Are you giving out random piggyback
rides now?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! ☆ I'm giving her a Marvelous Academy
Tour!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that sounds fun! Oh, watch out! Air
Groove's right on your tail!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't let her catch you, Marvey! I'll cheer you on
from the sidelines!
Popcorn, where's my popcorn...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is that Marvelous and the vice prez?
Youngsters these days have a lot of energy, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You can do it, you two! Whatever it is!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Last stop: the academy's training course! We're
almost at the finish line! ☆

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There you are! Oh, when I catch you, Marvelous
Sunday—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: She found us! ☆ Time for the last spurt! ★

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I'm weighing you down—she's definitely
going to catch us!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it! ☆ Just hold on, 'cause I'm gonna
make this a marvelous finish! ★

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Wow! It's like we're one with the wind!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But she's gaining on us! Don't lose, Marvelous!
You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: You bet I can! ☆★ Just... a little... further!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: All right, this game of tag is over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Marvelous Sunday's valiant effort, Air
Groove catches up to her just before the finish
line.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Finally. You've got some explaining to do,
Marvelous Sunday.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I see. So you were trying to inspire her.
What do you think, new prospect? Did it work?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! Hearing everyone cheer us on was
amazing. It made me remember that I'm not
alone!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And even when things looked bad, Marvelous
never gave up... I wanna be just like her!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Now you get it! ☆ Friends cheering each other on
is marvelous, and so is having the spirit to always
move forward! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
That's the heart of what Tracen Academy stands
for! ☆ Isn't it marvelous? ★ Ahahahahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I like the fire in your eyes.
Anyway, I suppose I'll overlook your little
getaway act, Marvelous Sunday.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Yay! That's marvelously kind of you, Vice Prez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Marvelous Sunday's impromptu tour, it
looks like Tracen Academy has gained a
promising new racer!
